.github/workflows/ci.yaml.general_idea: Update the default Java version in the CI workflow from 11 to 21 to align with the target JDK migration.
.github/workflows/ci.yaml.why_exists: The project has migrated to JDK 21; running tests on JDK 11 may fail due to removed APIs or incompatibilities with newer dependencies (e.g., Keycloak 24.x).

Dockerfile.general_idea: Migrate the base builder image from Java 11 to Java 21 to support the new JDK version.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Java 11 images are deprecated or incompatible with the target JDK 21 build requirements; using an older JDK image may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 features or dependencies.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Migrate the base runtime image from Java 11 to Java 21 to ensure the application runs on the target JDK.
Dockerfile.why_exists: Running a Java 21 compiled application on a Java 11 runtime image will result in a runtime error (UnsupportedClassVersionError) or missing features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 11 to Java 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the compiler plugin is not configured for the target JDK 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot version from 2.2.4.RELEASE to 3.2.3 to align with Java 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; upgrading is required to compile and run on the new JDK.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Keycloak version from 9.0.0 to 24.0.5 to match the new ecosystem baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Keycloak versions may have API incompatibilities or dependencies that do not support Java 21 or Spring Boot 3.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add JVM arguments to export internal security modules required by newer JDKs.
pom.xml.why_exists: Java 21 encapsulates internal APIs by default; without these exports, libraries relying on sun.security internals will fail at runtime with InaccessibleObjectException.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 and Hamcrest dependencies with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) and modern test libraries.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is deprecated in modern Spring Boot starters; tests using JUnit 4 annotations will not be discovered or will fail without the vintage engine or migration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Resteasy dependency from 3.0.14.Final to 7.0.0.Alpha2 to support Jakarta EE namespaces.
pom.xml.why_exists: Resteasy 3.x uses javax.ws.* packages; Resteasy 7.x uses jakarta.ws.*. Without this, imports will fail to resolve if the codebase is migrated to Jakarta.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Maven profiles to handle legacy Keycloak API differences via source replacement.
pom.xml.why_exists: Keycloak 24+ uses Jakarta EE (jakarta.ws) and new APIs; older versions use javax.ws. This allows building against multiple Keycloak versions without compile errors.
